title: Advanced Math
description: Learn to create matrices, summations, integrals, and roots.
instructions: Create a 2x2 matrix with elements 1, 2 in the first row and 3, 4 in the second row. Below it, write a summation from i=1 to n of i. Then, write a definite integral from 0 to 1 of x.
hint: Use the mat() function for matrices. Use sum_(i=1)^n i for summation, int_0^1 x dif x for integrals.
